summary: SINGLE_FOCUS ComplexPlane. 3x3 matrix A(s)=(1-s)A0+sA1 via ValueTracker s_tr. always_redraw: 3 BLUE/GREEN/ORANGE Gershgorin disks centered at diagonal entries with radii = off-diag row sums, plus 3 RED eigenvalue dots (numpy.linalg.eigvals). Eigenvalues stay in union throughout. Live λ_1, λ_2, λ_3 panel.
